title: Zoospore Isolation of Aurantiochytrium limacinum
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8a85p","text":"This protocol results in the isolation of single nucleated zoospores from a culture of Aurantiochytrium limacinum.  The point is to recover single nucleus colonies rather than single cell colonies (which may contain varying nuclei - particularly following transformation).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":87,"length":26}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"795ab","text":"Filtration Pump (or other way to pull a vacuum)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7033t","text":"Filter holder (mftr#: Thermo Scientific Nalgene 300-4000)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"akabu","text":"5 um nylon filter (catalog#: R50SP04700)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kvuh","text":"15 ml culture tube","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4mena","text":"GPY media (+ zeocin 100 ug/ml)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"839tn","text":" - 0.5% Yeast Extract, 1% Peptone, 3% D+-Glucose, 1.8% instant ocean ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fct9m","text":"GPY zeocin plate (+ zeocin 100 ug/ml + ampicilin 100 ug/ml)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6d8k2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Inoculate 500 ul GPY media (microcentrifuge tube) with toothpick scrape of a colony. If inoculating a zeocin resistant colony, add 5 ul zeocin (for 100 ug/ml). Vortex/ resuspend cells. Pipette 4.5 ml of GPY into a 15 ml glass culture tube. Add 500 ul inoculum. Incubate at 28 C, 170 rpm for 48 h, or until microscopy reveals the presence of zoospores.
Filter culture using a 5 um nylon filter membrane, nalgene filter holder, and filtration pump.Transfer flowthrough to a microcentrifuge tube and centrifuge 5 min 11000 rpm.

Resuspend cell pellet in 100 ul of ½ Artificial Seawater (ASW) or media. Make a 10X dilution by adding 10 ul of cells to 90 ul of ½ ASW or media. Spread onto 2% agar GPY (+ zeocin +amp) plate. Incubate at 28 C for 48 - 72 h until colonies appear.
creator: Mariana Rius
